purpose: Define capability stages and measurable growth for shared language judgment.
load_condition: Load when coaching, improvement, or practice measurement is requested.

stages.name: Informal Communicator
stages.description: Uses words naturally without formalizing terms. Does not maintain a CONTEXT document. Verbosity is high. Ambiguity is resolved through clarification cycles.
indicators: No CONTEXT document exists or it is stale
Same concept described differently each time

stages.name: Terminology Steward
stages.description: Maintains a CONTEXT document with domain terms and banned terms. Proposes new terms when verbosity is detected. Records ADRs for consequential decisions. Checks term usage for consistency.
indicators: CONTEXT document is active and up to date
New terms proposed when verbose descriptions appear
Term usage checked against CONTEXT definitions

stages.name: Language Strategist
stages.description: Proactively identifies terminology gaps before they cause problems. Distinguishes terms that need formalization from those that don't. Manages terminology evolution — updates terms when meaning shifts. Designs naming schemes that scale with the project.
indicators: Terminology gaps identified proactively, not reactively
Only consequential terms formalized — no over-formalization
Stale terms detected and updated before they mislead
Naming schemes designed for project growth

evolution_layers.name: From informal to steward
evolution_layers.capability: Consistently maintain and use a shared language document

evolution_layers.name: From steward to strategist
evolution_layers.capability: Proactively manage terminology and design naming schemes that scale

measurement.how: Days since the CONTEXT document was last updated, divided by the number of domain terms. Lower is better.
measurement.threshold: ST-002: Updated at least weekly during active development. ST-003: Updated within 24 hours of any terminology change.

measurement.how: Compare token count for describing domain concepts before and after term formalization.
measurement.threshold: ST-002: >50% token reduction for formalized concepts. ST-003: >70%.

measurement.how: Count the number of times a formalized term is used inconsistently, divided by total uses of that term.
